user.title: Add a Medication
user.description: Choose a medication name and how you want to track it.

data_description.tracking_type: Choose how you want to track this medication.

regular_interval.title: Regular Interval
regular_interval.description: Set up dosing at fixed intervals — e.g. every 8 hours.

data_description.safe_doses: Maximum doses allowed within the time window.
data_description.time_window_hours: Rolling window for safe dose calculation, e.g. max 2 pills in 8 hours.
data_description.strength: Per-dose strength in mg. Required for PK tracking.
data_description.half_life: Elimination half-life. Required for PK tracking.
data_description.hours_to_peak: Time to peak concentration. Required for absorption modeling.

time_of_day.title: Time of Day
time_of_day.description: Set up dosing at a specific time each day.

data_description.time_of_day: Time of day to take the medication.
data_description.safe_doses: Maximum doses allowed within the time window.
data_description.time_window_hours: Rolling window for safe dose calculation, e.g. max 2 pills in 24 hours.
data_description.strength: Per-dose strength in mg. Required for PK tracking.
data_description.half_life: Elimination half-life. Required for PK tracking.
data_description.hours_to_peak: Time to peak concentration. Required for absorption modeling.

as_needed.title: As Needed
as_needed.description: Set up on-demand dosing with a safety limit.

data_description.safe_doses: Maximum doses allowed within the time window.
data_description.time_window_hours: Rolling window for safe dose calculation, e.g. max 2 pills in 8 hours.
data_description.strength: Per-dose strength in mg. Required for PK tracking.
data_description.half_life: Elimination half-life. Required for PK tracking.
data_description.hours_to_peak: Time to peak concentration. Required for absorption modeling.

cyclic.title: Cyclic/Calendar Pattern
cyclic.description: Set up a cycling schedule — e.g. 5 days on, 2 days off.

data_description.days_on: Number of active days in the cycle.
data_description.days_off: Number of rest days in the cycle.
data_description.cycle_anchor_date: Start date of the on/off cycle.
data_description.dose_time: Time of day to take on active days.
data_description.safe_doses: Maximum doses allowed within the time window.
data_description.time_window_hours: Rolling window for safe dose calculation, e.g. max 1 pill in 24 hours.
data_description.strength: Per-dose strength in mg. Required for PK tracking.
data_description.half_life: Elimination half-life. Required for PK tracking.
data_description.hours_to_peak: Time to peak concentration. Required for absorption modeling.

effectiveness.title: Metrics Tracker
effectiveness.description: Select which symptoms to track. Each enabled metric adds a 1–10 slider to rate how you feel after each dose.

data_description.custom_metrics: Separate multiple with commas, e.g. brain fog, joint stiffness. A 1–10 slider is created for each.

init.title: Schedule & Dosing
init.description: Adjust the schedule, safety limits, and pharmacokinetic parameters. Effectiveness metrics can be changed on the next page.

data_description.time_of_day: Time of day to take the medication.
data_description.time_window_hours: Rolling window for safe dose calculation.
data_description.days_on: Number of active days in the cycle.
data_description.days_off: Number of rest days in the cycle.
data_description.cycle_anchor_date: Start date of the on/off cycle.
data_description.dose_time: Time of day to take on active days.
data_description.safe_doses: Maximum doses allowed within the time window.
data_description.strength: Per-dose strength in mg. Required for PK tracking.
data_description.half_life: Elimination half-life. Required for PK tracking.
data_description.hours_to_peak: Time to peak concentration. Required for absorption modeling.

effectiveness.title: Metrics Tracker
effectiveness.description: Select which symptoms to track. Each enabled metric adds a 1–10 slider to rate how you feel after each dose.

data_description.custom_metrics: Separate multiple with commas, e.g. brain fog, joint stiffness. A 1–10 slider is created for each.
